title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 980 至 1554 行，共 1554 行) ---
 980 | 
 981 |     def _existing_memory_signatures(self) -> set:
 982 |         if not self.memory_manager or not hasattr(self.memory_manager, "long_term_memory"):
 983 |             return set()
 984 |         try:
 985 |             return {self._memory_item_signature(item) for item in self.memory_manager.long_term_memory.get_all_items()}
 986 |         except Exception:
 987 |             return set()
 988 | 
 989 |     def _memory_item_signature(self, item: MemoryItem) -> str:
 990 |         raw = "\n".join([item.kind, item.title.strip().lower(), item.content.strip().lower(), "|".join(sorted(item.files))])
 991 |         return hashlib.sha256(raw.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()
 992 | 
 993 |     def _infer_project_from_memory_manager(self) -> str:
 994 |         storage_dir = getattr(getattr(self.memory_manager, "long_term_memory", None), "storage_dir", None)
 995 |         if storage_dir:
 996 |             try:
 997 |                 return str(storage_dir.parent)
 998 |             except Exception:
 999 |                 return ""
1000 |         return ""
1001 | 
1002 |     def _shorten_text(self, text: str, limit: int = 80) -> str:
1003 |         text = " ".join(str(text).split())
1004 |         return text if len(text) <= limit else text[: limit - 1] + "…"
1005 | 
1006 |     def _extract_memory_concepts(self, text: str, extra: Optional[List[str]] = None) -> List[str]:
1007 |         concepts = list(extra or [])
1008 |         for token in re.findall(r"[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_\.:-]{2,}|[\u4e00-\u9fff]{2,}", text):
1009 |             if token not in concepts:
1010 |                 concepts.append(token)
1011 |             if len(concepts) >= 12:
1012 |                 break
1013 |         return concepts
1014 | 
1015 |     def _extract_compressed_state(
1016 |         self,
1017 |         turns: List[ConversationTurn],
1018 |         dropped_turns: Optional[List[ConversationTurn]] = None,
1019 |         llm_summary_text: str = "",
1020 |     ) -> CompressedSessionState:
1021 |         """Build a deterministic structured state from turn metadata and content."""
1022 |         source_turns = [turn for turn in turns if turn.is_valid_openai_tool_turn]
1023 |         state = CompressedSessionState(source_turn_ids=[turn.id for turn in source_turns])
1024 |         state.task_goal = self._extract_task_goal(source_turns)
1025 |         state.current_status = self._infer_current_status(source_turns)
1026 | 
1027 |         file_paths = []
1028 |         for turn in source_turns:
1029 |             file_paths.extend(turn.files_touched)
1030 |             text = self._turn_text(turn)
1031 |             self._collect_steps(text, state.completed_steps, state.pending_steps)
1032 |             self._collect_decisions(text, state.key_decisions)
1033 |             self._collect_preferences(text, state.user_preferences)
1034 |             self._collect_commands_and_tests(turn, text, state.commands_run, state.tests_run)
1035 |             self._collect_files_read(turn, state.files_read)
1036 |             for error in turn.errors:
1037 |                 resolved = self._looks_resolved_after(source_turns, turn)
1038 |                 state.errors_encountered.append({
1039 |                     "message": error[:300],
1040 |                     "status": "resolved" if resolved else "failed",
1041 |                     "source_turn_id": turn.id,
1042 |                     "files": turn.files_touched[:5],
1043 |                     "resolved": resolved,
1044 |                 })
1045 | 
1046 |         for path in dict.fromkeys(file_paths):
1047 |             state.files_changed.append({
1048 |                 "path": path,
1049 |                 "action": self._infer_file_action(path, source_turns),
1050 |                 "summary": "从 turn 元数据提取的文件变更",
1051 |             })
1052 | 
1053 |         if any((turn.has_tool_calls or turn.tool_messages) and not turn.is_valid_openai_tool_tu...
